# Introduction
## Base Track: Sovereign RAG (No-Code) for AI for Global Finance
Welcome to the **Base Track** for Legal in AI for Global Finance. This track is designed to help you develop a strong foundation in legal knowledge and domain adaptation using NotebookLM, an open-source framework specifically tailored for financial industries.

## Goal
Link Google Drive folders directly to NotebookLM for instant Domain RAG and enhance your understanding of regulatory compliance, laws, and policies affecting global finance.

## Step-by-Step Guide
1. Create a dedicated Google Drive folder for legal policies, manuals, and datasets.
2. In NotebookLM, click **Add Source** -> **Google Drive**.
3. Select your designated folder. NotebookLM will now automatically sync and ground its answers based on the continually updated files within that folder.

---
# Business Value
## Leveraging AI for Global Finance with Legal Domain Adaptation
By leveraging NotebookLM's capabilities to link Google Drive folders directly, you can streamline your legal knowledge acquisition process, reduce the time spent on data integration, and increase the accuracy of your answers. This approach enables you to focus on developing expertise in specific domains (e.g., tax law, derivatives trading) rather than learning a broad range of topics.

## Step-by-Step Guide
1. Use NotebookLM's Google Drive source feature to link relevant policies, manuals, and datasets directly into your notebook.
2. Apply domain-specific AI models trained on regulatory compliance frameworks to improve your understanding of laws and regulations affecting global finance.
3. Utilize the output from these models to generate answers, perform calculations, or visualize data in real-time, thereby enhancing your productivity and accuracy.

---

# Conclusion
This Base Track provides a solid foundation for developing expertise in AI for Global Finance using NotebookLM. By leveraging Google Drive folders directly and domain-specific AI models, you can accelerate your learning process and focus on delivering high-quality results to clients.
